# [PUB-03] CLARA proof-trace note (CL-02 dependency)

**Local plan ID:** `#13` (placeholder).
**Track:** PUB-03.
**SIP section:** §5.
**Labels:** `track:PUB`, `area:publication`, `r5:target`, `type:docs`.
**Blocked by:** CL-02 (`#2`).

## Goal (target)

Write a short note describing the CLARA proof-trace status once
CL-02's Coq proof for the Lucas-POST identity lands.

## Scope

- One short note (markdown or PDF) citing the green Coq trace from
  `coq/` and `trios-coq/`.
- Cross-link from [`CLARA_TRACEABILITY.md`](../../CLARA_TRACEABILITY.md).

## Done when

- [ ] Note posted (location TBD: in-repo or sub-record of existing DOI).
- [ ] `CLARA_TRACEABILITY.md` row promoted.

## Anti-claims

- "Note", not "paper" — no venue acceptance claimed.
- Covers only the identity proved in CL-02, not the entire design.
